Jyske Bank Capital Changes Shape Future Shareholder Returns And Earnings Outlook
news.summary: Jyske Bank shareholders approved a reduction in share capital at an Extraordinary General Meeting. The meeting also backed amendments to the Articles of Association, including language changes for annual reports.
